title: Pet Munchies Small Buffalo Dental Chews, Healthy, Natural and Long-Lasting Dog Treats, Grain Free and Low in Fat 55g, Pack of 8 (32 Chews)
features: NATURAL & HEALTHY DENTAL CHEWS: Made with 100% natural human grade grass fed buffalo, these chews are grain & gluten free, naturally low in fat, high in protein and are made with no artificial colours or flavours
GREAT FOR TEETH AND GUMS: Our premium dental chews help reduce tartar and plaque for healthy teeth and gums to support good oral health for your dogs
LONG-LASTING: A delicious, healthy treat that has been designed to be long lasting and satisfy your dog's natural instinct to chew and leave tails wagging!
FOR A HEALTHY SKIN & COAT: This healthy chew is infused with salmon oil which is great for a healthy skin & coat as well as joint mobility due to the rich levels of Omega 4

SUITABLE FOR ALL BREEDS & SIZES: Our gourmet dental chews are suitable for all breeds of dogs and puppies over 4 months - please remember that these treats should make up a small part of your pet's balanced diet
description: From the brand Previous page Premium gourmet pet treats Our premium, gourmet pet treats are made from the finest human-grade meat and fish, from succulent chicken and tender venison to wild salmon, delicately roasted to perfection to retain their 100% natural flavours. Packed with protein and low in fat and salt, our delicious treats are free from any artificial additives, and we're proud to offer both grain- and gluten-free options for pets with dietary sensitivities too. Natural Dog Treats Visit the store Gourmet Dog Food & Treats From training treats to dental chews & stix, we’ve got yummy, nutritious treats in all shapes & sizes to delight your canine companion. Dog Training Treats Visit the store Dental Chews Visit the store Next page

specifications_table.Storage Information: ‎Pet Munchies come in a fully re sealable bag, simply reseal and store in a cool, dry place. Always store out of reach of pets or children.
